pi_items.source: Code analysis of setup_task.sh (line 19), export_result.sh (line 9), and verifier.py (line 147) - path used consistently across all task scripts
Code analysis of setup_task.sh (line 20), export_result.sh (line 8) - path used consistently across task scripts
Code analysis of verifier.py line 129 which checks 'if size > 50'
Verified against Blender Python API documentation (https://docs.blender.org/api/current/bpy.types.CompositorNodeGlare.html) and code analysis of export_result.sh line 98
Verified against Blender Python API documentation (https://docs.blender.org/api/current/bpy.types.CompositorNodeColorBalance.html) and code analysis of export_result.sh line 104
Verified against Blender Python API documentation (https://docs.blender.org/api/current/bpy.types.CompositorNodeLensdist.html) and code analysis of export_result.sh line 109

Code analysis of verifier.py line 100 which checks 'if thresh is not None and thresh <= 1.0'. This is a task-specific constraint; Blender documentation notes that threshold allows values above 1.0 for pixels brighter than white (https://docs.blender.org/manual/en/latest/compositing/types/filter/glare.html)

Code analysis of verifier.py line 106 which checks 'if -0.05 <= float(dist) <= 0.1'. This is a task-specific constraint; Blender's actual Lens Distortion node parameter range is -1.0 to 1.0 (https://docs.blender.org/manual/en/latest/compositing/types/transform/lens_distortion.html)
Code analysis of verifier.py line 106 which checks 'if -0.05 <= float(dist) <= 0.1'. This is a task-specific constraint within Blender's wider -1.0 to 1.0 range

Code analysis of install_blender.sh line 90 specifies 'BLENDER_VERSION="4.2.4"' and line 93 shows download URL from https://download.blender.org/release/Blender4.2/blender-4.2.4-linux-x64.tar.xz (353MB, verified via HTTP HEAD request)

pi_items.verified_value: BMW27.blend - Official Blender car benchmark scene by Mike Pan
pi_items.source: Code analysis of setup_blender.sh line 89 and setup_task.sh line 25 show BMW27.blend preferred as primary scene. Verified via web search as official Blender demo file containing detailed 3D car model with Cycles materials (https://download.blender.org/demo/test/)

privileged_info_summary: The compositor_node_setup@1 task uses real official Blender demo files (specifically BMW27.blend, a famous 3D car benchmark scene from Blender's official repository) rendered with Blender 4.2.4 LTS. The task requires three specific compositor nodes (CompositorNodeGlare, CompositorNodeColorBalance, CompositorNodeLensdist) to be properly connected in the node graph. The Glare node's threshold parameter is constrained to maximum 1.0 by the task verifier, and the Lens Distortion node's distortion parameter is constrained to the range -0.05 to 0.1 (narrower than Blender's native -1.0 to 1.0 range). The rendered output must be saved to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/cinematic_composite.png and be at least 50 KB in size.
